status: Ralph Loop Iteration 2: Advanced Location Analytics & Insights Feature
summary: Ralph Iteration 2: Implemented comprehensive Location Analytics & Insights system to help families and venue operators make data-driven decisions. Added analyticsEngine.ts utility (280+ lines) with rating distribution analysis, trend scoring, community engagement metrics, and intelligent recommendations. Created LocationAnalyticsPanel component (320+ lines) with beautiful visual analytics dashboard showing rating distributions, trend indicators, key metrics, and actionable insights. Added 41 new tests (26 for analyticsEngine, 15 for component). All 929 tests passing (100% success rate: 856 client + 73 server). Zero TypeScript errors. Production build successful (60.74 kB gzipped, 404ms build time). Boss feedback 'Make it better' addressed through analytics system that transforms review data into actionable intelligence for families and venue operators.
improvements_completed: ✓ Implemented rating distribution analysis from raw ratings
✓ Added trend scoring with historical data support
✓ Generated smart insights from analytics data
✓ Created LocationAnalyticsPanel React component with i18n support
✓ Added trend indicators with emoji support
✓ Created useI18n hook for i18n integration
✓ Verified all 929 tests passing (100% success rate)
✓ Production build successful (60.74 kB gzipped, 404ms build time)

analyticsEngine.description: Core analytics calculation engine for location insights

LocationAnalyticsPanel.description: React component for displaying location analytics
features: Overall rating display with sentiment color

user_value.families: Can see comprehensive analytics before visiting a location - rating trends, community sentiment, quality indicators
user_value.venue_operators: Understand family satisfaction levels, identify improvement areas, track quality trends over time
user_value.app_users: Make informed decisions with data-driven recommendations based on community feedback
